name: MESOTHELIAL CYST

demographics.Etiology: failure of mesothelial peritoneal surfaces to coalesce
demographics.Path: unilocular thin-walled cyst usually with serous, occasionally chylous / hemorrhagic fluid
demographics.Histo: lined by mesothelial cells + surrounded by thin layer of fibrous tissue

discriminating_features: single cyst up to several cm in size
± fluid levels related to fat + water components

general: single cyst up to several cm in size
CT: ± fluid levels related to fat + water components
